creator: rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com
text:
On Sun, 24 Jul 2011 14:34:56 -0800, Beech Rintoul wrote:
> Patches don't apply and/or create spurious files.
>
> Please diff against current sources from the tree and make sure none 
> of your
> modified files end in "*.orig" before diffing.
>
> Please resubmit.
>
> Beech

Beech,

Actually, I need to change this PR to roll back the upgrade back to 
1.9.1.1.  This is the first version I have seen with this behavior, 
which is that perl gets locked and takes up 100% cpu (single threaded 
operation).  I haven't had to do a downgrade before so how do I do that?

Rusty
